arts.ttl: Three observations from Real Madrid’s 3-0 win vs Girona
arts.sum: Real Madrid ’s first half against Girona was not unusual this season, but it did not matter as they cruised to a 3-0 win, with a goal each from Kylian Mbappe, Jude Bellingham and Arda Guler. Bellingham has been one of the best players in this stretch of the season where, although Real Madrid have collected wins, they have also lost a few, and those few were more important than the ones they won.

arts.ttl: What injury does Jude Bellingham have? When will he return for Real Madrid?
arts.sum: It is not the first time that the midfielder has succumbed to physical issues this season: most of Real Madrid’s squad have suffered some kind of injury throughout the current campaign, and Bellingham was out earlier in the season with a plantaris muscle injury . The game between Atalanta - Real Madrid will be played on Tuesday December 10 at Gewiss Stadium with kick off at 3:00 p.m. ET / 12:00 p.m. PT .

arts.sum: Jude Bellingham carried Real Madrid to a decisive victory over Girona, closing the gap to Barcelona atop the table.
